# Inspect Level 3 structure
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Level:", current_frame.level)
print("Step:", current_frame.step)
print("Shape:", current_frame.shape)
print()

# Group nodes by color and show key info
from collections import defaultdict
by_color = defaultdict(list)
for n in nodes:
    by_color[n['color']].append(n)

for color, nlist in sorted(by_color.items()):
    for n in nlist:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(p[0] for p in b)
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in b)

        print(f"  {n['color']}: id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bounds=({minr},{minc})-({maxr},{maxc}), children={n['children']}, hash={n['hash']}")

print()
print("Adjacency list:", seg['adjacency_list'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
